Input.name: customMods
Input.string: Spectre buffs: Wrath has no reservation Haste has No Reservation Zealotry has no reservation Nearby Allies' Damage with Hits is Lucky Nearby Allies have +30% to Critical Strike Multiplier Minions gain 20% of Physical Damage as Extra Lightning Damage Animated Guardain Buffs: Nearby Enemies have Malediction Nearby Allies have Culling Strike Nearby Allies have +50% to Critical Strike Multiplier

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Glorious Vanity Timeless Jewel Unique ID: 5f01c83b5ad75c57d8545731e66c521ee6c0879d88cca0d17cbce7f3cfa8081e Item Level: 84 Radius: Large Implicits: 0 Bathed in the blood of 1545 sacrificed in the name of Xibaqua Passives in radius are Conquered by the Vaal Historic

Rarity: RARE Cataclysm Curio Large Cluster Jewel Unique ID: b899cde798427f1cca2973c38ed901247170014545f689f0cfe64df26ae41ed5 Item Level: 84 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Adds 12 Passive Skills {crafted}2 Added Passive Skills are Jewel Sockets {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: Minions deal 10% increased Damage Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +5% to Chaos Resistance Added Small Passive Skills also grant: 4% increased Damage Added Small Passive Skills also grant: Minions have 3% increased Attack and Cast Speed Added Small Passive Skills have 35% increased Effect

Rarity: UNIQUE Thread of Hope Crimson Jewel Unique ID: bf049e85692ed9720fa4159f45554f51b4902112919e2d92d99b73f9568c6f4c Item Level: 87 Radius: Variable Implicits: 1 24% reduced Ignite Duration on you Only affects Passives in Massive Ring Passive Skills in Radius can be Allocated without being connected to your tree -20% to all Elemental Resistances Passage Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Grand Spectrum Cobalt Jewel Unique ID: 0a0af964408f164cbd1d4ac4ecdbdce522423beca49bb57b7ff7e99d8a7b1f93 Item Level: 68 Limited to: 3 Implicits: 1 25% reduced Bleed Duration on you Minions have +10% to Critical Strike Multiplier per Grand Spectrum Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Grand Spectrum Cobalt Jewel Unique ID: e23ef5ef3eab236048912e90d9b05c699d68c0548a4fee9984c0fb29d11a2803 Item Level: 75 Limited to: 3 Implicits: 0 Minions have +10% to Critical Strike Multiplier per Grand Spectrum

Rarity: RARE Sol Glimmer Small Cluster Jewel Unique ID: 067268f7e97acb0df8fa52bfddf65668fda573ffaa3b348bb2fc14c75275c903 Item Level: 83 LevelReq: 62 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Adds 2 Passive Skills {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: 15% increased Armour Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +4% to Chaos Resistance Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +5 to Intelligence Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +13 to Maximum Life 1 Added Passive Skill is Enduring Composure

Rarity: RARE Honour Shard Large Cluster Jewel Unique ID: 1b72533f9b51dccb147286826fba5dce8e6173c5491be6bf0c988552c9a262d0 Item Level: 84 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Adds 12 Passive Skills {crafted}2 Added Passive Skills are Jewel Sockets {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: Minions deal 10% increased Damage {fractured}Added Small Passive Skills also grant: Regenerate 0.1% of Life per Second Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +2 to Maximum Life Added Small Passive Skills also grant: Minions have 3% increased Attack and Cast Speed Added Small Passive Skills have 35% increased Effect Fractured Item

Rarity: UNIQUE Grand Spectrum Cobalt Jewel Unique ID: ddc0aad77831106cd8ceed40e82256af0b9ac9839b393868aea71e293c0ac70d Item Level: 68 Limited to: 3 Implicits: 0 Minions have +10% to Critical Strike Multiplier per Grand Spectrum

Rarity: UNIQUE Watcher's Eye Prismatic Jewel Unique ID: 48865a4cd464ab4998c55ef8d9dc12596d6857682b4410e7b96056b948833f93 Item Level: 86 Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 4% increased maximum Energy Shield 5% increased maximum Life 6% increased maximum Mana +8% Chance to Block Attack Damage while affected by Determination 20% of Cold and Lightning Damage taken as Fire Damage while affected by Purity of Fire Gain 20% of Physical Damage as Extra Lightning Damage while affected by Wrath

Rarity: MAGIC Examiner's Granite Flask of the Armadillo Unique ID: 36e9bbf7c93c76fec34bd3d16bbf4c0990aaab330c02b0a7af59f1f0a22e3cc8 Item Level: 85 Quality: 2 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full 27% increased Duration 60% increased Armour during Effect

Rarity: RARE Havoc Grasp Paladin Gloves Armour: 275 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.7796 Energy Shield: 55 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.8056 Unique ID: d546f8619e146fdb8e2f52241dc3699d108fa1073ae3f908fc542151bf0cb291 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B R-R LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 0.3% of Lightning Damage Leeched as Life 20% chance to Unnerve Enemies for 4 seconds on Hit +36 to Strength +60 to Dexterity Adds 6 to 12 Cold Damage to Attacks +120 to maximum Life +32% to Chaos Resistance {crafted}Minions deal 20% increased Damage

Rarity: RARE Vengeance Salvation Archdemon Crown Armour: 247 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.7716 Energy Shield: 50 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.7333 Unique ID: 298a3b5f1f69c88f95787907fa6af831d07aa468a1422ae185504f7c85944c47 Shaper Item Elder Item Item Level: 87 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B-R LevelReq: 75 Implicits: 2 -2 to Level of Socketed Support Gems +2 to Level of Socketed Skill Gems Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Concentrated Effect Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 18 Minion Damage Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Hypothermia Socketed Gems gain 50% of Physical Damage as extra Lightning Damage Socketed Spells have +3% to Critical Strike Chance Minions deal 22% increased Damage 24% increased Area Damage 19% increased Effect of Cold Ailments {crafted}+1 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems {crafted}10% increased Area of Effect

Rarity: MAGIC Martinet's Convening Wand Unique ID: abb26105a462795f33cefe5fc571e7686e13723e9320c28608468f39918993be Item Level: 61 Quality: 9 Sockets: R-R-B LevelReq: 50 Implicits: 1 Minions deal 24% increased Damage +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems

Rarity: RARE Hypnotic Gnarl Convoking Wand Unique ID: 43d23807b51f47474c92ccd054b39ba23bd4ad243791100f12888a0c479aa252 Item Level: 86 Quality: 0 Sockets: B-G-B LevelReq: 72 Implicits: 1 Minions deal 30% increased Damage {fractured}Minions deal 94% increased Damage +1 to Level of all Spell Skill Gems +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems {crafted}Can have up to 3 Crafted Modifiers {crafted}Trigger a Socketed Spell when you Use a Skill, with a 8 second Cooldown {crafted}Spells Triggered this way have 150% more Cost {crafted}Minions have 14% increased Attack Speed {crafted}Minions have 15% increased Cast Speed Fractured Item

Rarity: RARE Agony Span Martyr Boots Armour: 401 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.6263 Energy Shield: 81 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.6611 Unique ID: 5c33d6b85f7e30c2a713554c21474a5a26c84738892e3f10f08a13dbfde5298c Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Item Level: 85 Quality: 23 Sockets: B-R-B-R LevelReq: 78 Implicits: 2 Regenerate 0.2% of Life per second per Endurance Charge +1% to maximum Fire Resistance 69% increased Armour and Energy Shield +123 to maximum Life +42% to Fire Resistance +40% to Cold Resistance +35% to Chaos Resistance 30% increased Movement Speed

Rarity: UNIQUE Dawnbreaker Colossal Tower Shield Armour: 1940 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.9999 Unique ID: bbe48a282ca7057b70fece1c0cae40324c5d76a0897e02a1ccd729e1d8ce933d Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-R-R LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 1 +20 to maximum Life 169% increased Armour +25% Chance to Block -1% Chance to Block Attack Damage for every 200 Fire Damage taken from Hits Recently 20% of Cold Damage taken as Fire Damage 20% of Lightning Damage taken as Fire Damage 19% of Physical Damage taken as Fire Damage Scorch Enemies in Close Range when you Block

Rarity: RARE Foul Glare Ghastly Eye Jewel Unique ID: 24e2f77461b403a2530ce46df501cfea83a1fddedabc5d71010c1f9547e80b77 Item Level: 76 LevelReq: 31 Implicits: 0 {fractured}+27 to maximum Life Minions deal 16% increased Damage if you've used a Minion Skill Recently Minions Leech 0.31% of Damage as Life Minions deal 2 to 28 additional Lightning Damage Fractured Item

Rarity: RARE Grim Leer Ghastly Eye Jewel Unique ID: c793acea146993b1ab35df50b86b72b1859f766b05a8998049195eb7adb967b8 Item Level: 83 LevelReq: 59 Implicits: 0 +32 to maximum Life +15% to Fire Resistance Minions deal 18% increased Damage if you've used a Minion Skill Recently Minions deal 2 to 28 additional Lightning Damage

Rarity: UNIQUE Darkness Enthroned Stygian Vise Unique ID: 1346b24f1b0aa8397d7760c57691c2df1be2d25b4a29cb19c3a4db872690c2a7 Item Level: 85 Sockets: A A Implicits: 1 Has 1 Abyssal Socket Has 1 Abyssal Socket 95% increased Effect of Socketed Abyss Jewels

Rarity: UNIQUE Doryani's Prototype Saint's Hauberk Armour: 1561 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.1343 Energy Shield: 267 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.11 Unique ID: e54a8e894dd48fb8f952d64fde3bd9a55e604e9387b94b74d12d0e424ae20208 Item Level: 84 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B-R-B-R LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 2 +1% to all maximum Resistances 5% reduced Chaos Damage taken 189% increased Armour and Energy Shield +79 to maximum Life Deal no Non-Lightning Damage Armour also applies to Lightning Damage taken from Hits Lightning Resistance does not affect Lightning Damage taken Nearby Enemies have Lightning Resistance equal to yours Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Phoenix Barb Convoking Wand Unique ID: 22790b0df2727f8f31c30c78aa075e999aa1f11d62db24cfe933301de171523c Item Level: 85 Quality: 0 Sockets: R-R B LevelReq: 72 Implicits: 1 Minions deal 26% increased Damage Adds 9 to 16 Cold Damage 103% increased Spell Critical Strike Chance +73 to maximum Mana 46% increased Mana Regeneration Rate +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems Minions have +24% to Critical Strike Multiplier

Rarity: RARE Apocalypse Clasp Focused Amulet Unique ID: 31ddae34483d75d278b5aa03b2efad4f00d879f13d06bf7ea7ee54a3d030f8ce Item Level: 84 LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 5 {crafted}Allocates Testudo -1 Prefix Modifier allowed -2 Suffix Modifiers allowed Implicit Modifiers Cannot Be Changed 100% increased Explicit Modifier magnitudes +2 to Level of all Skill Gems +2 to Level of all Lightning Skill Gems {crafted}+50 to Strength and Intelligence Split

Rarity: RARE Fate Eye Bone Ring Unique ID: fc05c768ea9716a355e880664a7db60e87115aa54ac788c535d31c3076caa823 Item Level: 83 LevelReq: 48 Implicits: 1 Minions have +13% to all Elemental Resistances +247 to maximum Life +95% to Cold Resistance -92% to Lightning Resistance Minions have 27% reduced Movement Speed

Rarity: RARE Honour Goad Convoking Wand Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B LevelReq: 72 Implicits: 1 Minions deal 30% increased Damage {fractured}Minions deal 108% increased Damage +1 to Level of all Spell Skill Gems +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems Minions have 12% increased Attack and Cast Speed Minions have 94% increased Critical Strike Chance {crafted}Trigger a Socketed Spell when you Use a Skill, with a 8 second Cooldown {crafted}Spells Triggered this way have 150% more Cost Split Fractured Item

Rarity: UNIQUE Bottled Faith Sulphur Flask Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 27 Implicits: 1 Creates Consecrated Ground on Use Lasts 5.80 Seconds Consumes 40 of 60 Charges on use Currently has 0 Charges 27% reduced Duration Consecrated Ground created by this Flask has Tripled Radius Consecrated Ground created during Effect applies 10% increased Damage taken to Enemies 141% increased Critical Strike Chance against Enemies on Consecrated Ground during Effect

Rarity: UNIQUE Mageblood Heavy Belt Item Level: 83 LevelReq: 44 Implicits: 1 +42 to Strength Quality (Attribute Modifiers): +20% +54 to Dexterity +22% to Fire Resistance +25% to Cold Resistance Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used Leftmost 4 Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed

Rarity: MAGIC Dabbler's Ruby Flask of the Owl Item Level: 84 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 2 {crafted}69% increased effect {crafted}Gains no Charges during Effect Lasts 5.50 Seconds Consumes 20 of 50 Charges on use Currently has 0 Charges 31% reduced Duration 25% increased effect 62% reduced Effect of Curses on you during Effect

Rarity: MAGIC Dabbler's Granite Flask of the Impala Item Level: 84 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 2 {crafted}70% increased effect {crafted}Gains no Charges during Effect Lasts 4.30 Seconds Consumes 30 of 60 Charges on use Currently has 0 Charges 28% reduced Duration 25% increased effect 60% increased Evasion Rating during Effect

Rarity: MAGIC Alchemist's Jade Flask of the Armadillo Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0}FlaskEffectReducedDuration3 Suffix: {range:0.845}FlaskBuffArmourWhileHealing4 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 2 {crafted}{range:1}(60-70)% increased effect {crafted}Gains no Charges during Effect 23% reduced Duration 25% increased effect 59% increased Armour during Effect
